body: Meta, Alphabet, Amazon, and Microsoft all beat earnings estimates, but the stocks had mixed reactions. Here's why. https://bit.ly/426NTGU.
Big Tech earnings fuels mixed stock moves, as Meta plunges and Alphabet surges - Business Insider ... Apple Reports Earnings — Live Updates - WSJ.

Stock Market News, April 30, 2026: Dow rises 790 points, S&P 500 and Nasdaq close at records as GDP data shows the U.S. economy continues to grow; Big Tech slips; oil falls back from four-year high; Alphabet shares jump as Meta falls. The selloff in technology stocks was weighing on the S&P 500 and Nasdaq composite on Thursday morning after the so-called Magnificent Seven group reported mixed earnings on Wednesday afternoon. The Roundhill Magnificent Seven ETF was falling nearly 2%, pressured by the nearly 10% decline in shares of Meta Platforms. Microsoft's stock was also tumbling nearly 5%, while Amazon.com was down over 1%. Google-parent Alphabet, meanwhile, was outpacing its rivals, up over 5%, as its cloud business grew faster than its Big Tech peers such as Amazon and Microsoft.
